manifest.name: Hilo

name: Hilo

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Documentation and internal-quality release — no user-visible behavior changes since [0.1.5](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/releases/tag/0.1.5).

## What's new

### 📸 Per-style screenshots in the Visual styles section

Each of the three styles — Default, Lowlight, and Underlined — now has its own compact preview screenshot in the README, so the visual signature of each is readable at a glance without opening the plugin.

## Internal (no user impact)

- **CSS neutralizer scoped to Underlined** — the `:has()`-based rules that prevent Obsidian's native highlight background from bleeding through the Underlined style now only apply under `body.od-style-underlined`, limiting selector-invalidation cost to sessions with that style active. Default and Lowlight sessions no longer evaluate these selectors at all.
- **Lint rationale comments** — inline explanations for three marketplace-lint items that are intentional trade-offs:
  - `:has()` — empirically required for the ancestor-direction DOM shape; performance limited by the scope above.
  - `box-decoration-break` — flagged for Obsidian 1.4.5 partial support, but our `minAppVersion` (1.5.0, Chromium 116+) has full support.
  - `PluginSettingTab.display()` — deprecated in Obsidian 1.13.0 in favor of `getSettingDefinitions()`; we stay on the legacy API until `minAppVersion` is raised past 1.12.

## Compatibility

- No breaking changes.
- Same `minAppVersion` (1.5.0).
- Byte-identical output verified for Default / Lowlight / Underlined via render tests.

## Install

**Marketplace**: Settings → Community plugins → Browse → search "Hilo".

**Manual**: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and drop them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hilo/` folder, then enable Hilo under Community plugins.
releases.name: 0.1.6 — Per-style screenshots and CSS hygiene

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Three community-driven enhancements contributed by [@PostPollux](https://github.com/PostPollux) ([#1](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/1), [#2](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/2), [#3](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/3)) — no breaking changes.

## What's new

### 🎨 New "Underlined" highlight style ([#2](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/2))

A third style joining Default and Lowlight — a thin band of color at the bottom of the text, no fill. Works cleanly on both light and dark themes.

### 👁 Live style preview in Settings ([#2](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/2))

Each style is now rendered as a live sample under the Highlight style dropdown so you can see its visual signature before selecting.

### 🖍 Color previews in submenus ([#3](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/3))

Each color in the Highlight / Change color right-click submenus is now rendered in its own hex — the palette is visually recognizable at a glance.

### 📱 Command icons for the mobile toolbar ([#1](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/1))

The Open color palette and Unhighlight commands now carry meaningful lucide icons (highlighter / eraser) instead of the default "?" placeholder when added to the mobile toolbar.

## Docs

- README's Visual styles section rewritten to cover all three styles side by side; the Settings screenshot has been recaptured to include the new live preview panel.

## Compatibility

- No breaking changes.
- No new settings required — existing vaults inherit the new features on first load.
- Same `minAppVersion` (1.5.0).

## Install

**Marketplace**: Settings → Community plugins → Browse → search "Hilo".

**Manual**: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and drop them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hilo/` folder, then enable Hilo under Community plugins.

## Thanks

Huge thanks to [@PostPollux](https://github.com/PostPollux) — first-time contributor with three polished, well-documented PRs and thorough back-and-forth on the review. Contributions like this are what make community plugins worth building.
releases.name: 0.1.5 — Underlined style, color previews, and mobile toolbar icons

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Two community-driven improvements from @PostPollux ([PR #1](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/1), [PR #3](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/pull/3)).

## What's new
- **Command icons for mobile toolbar** — the Open color palette and Unhighlight commands now show meaningful lucide icons (highlighter / eraser) instead of the default question-mark placeholder when added to the mobile toolbar.
- **Color preview in submenus** — each color in the Highlight / Change color submenus is now rendered in its own hex, so the palette is visually recognizable at a glance.

Thanks @PostPollux for the polished contributions.
releases.name: 0.1.4 — Menu icons and color previews

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Documentation-only release — no functional changes since [0.1.2](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/releases/tag/0.1.2). `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` are byte-identical to 0.1.2 except for the version bump.

## What's new

- **README screenshots** — hero (multi-color highlights with inline markdown and a mid-line 3-way split), right-click color menu, and Settings → Hilo panel.
- **Demo video** — a 39-second demo on YouTube: https://youtu.be/fLbVhfi5H6c
- **Scaff credit** — a "Built with" section pointing to [Scaff](https://github.com/opellen/Scaff), the markdown-based AI harness used to build Hilo.

## Install

Marketplace: Settings → Community plugins → Browse → search "Hilo".

Manual: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and drop them into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hilo/` folder, then enable Hilo under Community plugins.
releases.name: 0.1.3 — Screenshots, demo video, and Scaff credit

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Patch release — removes the `(coming soon)` text from the Community Plugins install section in both README.md and README.ko.md. The Obsidian directory review interpreted it as unfilled placeholder text.

No code changes; identical `main.js` / `styles.css` to 0.1.1.
releases.name: 0.1.2 — README fix

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Marketplace review fixes — no user-facing feature changes.

## Fixes
- **manifest description** no longer includes the word "Obsidian" (redundant in marketplace context).
- **No more dynamic `<style>` elements**. Color definitions now use inline CSS custom properties (`--hl-bg`, `--hl-underline`) per highlight element, with generic rules in `styles.css`. Removes the prior `applyHighlightColors` style-injection path that the directory rejects.
- **Popout window compatibility**: body classname toggle now uses `activeDocument` instead of `document`.
- **TypeScript / ESLint cleanup**: replaced `(app as any).commands` and `(editor as any).cm` accesses with typed local interfaces; annotated regex replacer callbacks; wrapped 7 async event handlers in settings tab with `void (async () => {…})()`.
- **`builtin-modules` dependency** removed in favor of Node's built-in `node:module`.

## Internal
- `settings.save()` now triggers an empty CodeMirror dispatch via `workspace.iterateCodeMirrors` so editor decorations pick up new colors immediately.
- 127 tests, all green; typecheck clean.

## Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hilo/` folder.
releases.name: 0.1.1 — Marketplace review fixes

releases.author: san-tekart
releases.description:
Initial release of Hilo — multi-color highlights for Obsidian using the native `==text==` markdown syntax.

## Highlights
- Inline markdown (`**bold**`, `[[wikilinks]]`, `*italics*`) renders correctly inside a highlight.
- Slug-based token format (`=={color}text==`) keeps notes portable — hex values live in plugin settings.
- Consistent rendering across Source, Live Preview, and Reading view.
- iA Writer–style lowlight mode with per-color darker underline.
- Migration support for existing Highlightr `<mark>` highlights.
- English + Korean UI (auto-detected from Obsidian language setting).

## Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hilo/` folder. Then enable **Hilo** under **Settings → Community plugins**.

See [README](https://github.com/opellen/Hilo/blob/main/README.md) for full usage and configuration.
releases.name: 0.1.0 — Initial release
